actionUnits.condition: MonoBehaviour_0 (fileID 123183794) on Mesh_TrafficLight references script guid 50410efda0128f248aadbf8266a903cb, matching the provided TrafficLights class. Serialized fields map to Light components: Red fileID 8569639267829841366 (prefab guid 743b330bb9f325948b9118bc7695a4c1), Green fileID 2097357867, Yellow fileID 888664352. No UnityEvent m_Calls are present. The Start() coroutine (auto-invoked on enable) cycles lights: initially Yellow=false; Green=true and Red=false for 30s; Debug.Log("on"); Yellow=true and Green=false for 5s; Debug.Log("on"); Red=true and Yellow=false for 30s; loops. Wait through ≥65s to cover all state transitions and both Debug.Log calls.
